stemHtml: Aircraft A knows it is being overtaken. The pilot of A looks at the two o'clock position and first sees a red light, then after a while a white light. Where is the overtaking Aircraft B relative to A?

options.a: Aircraft B is to the right of Aircraft A.
options.b: Aircraft B could be to either side of Aircraft A.
options.c: The position of Aircraft B cannot be determined.
options.d: Aircraft B is to the left of Aircraft A.
